docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY CLAPP, JENNIFER DBA JENNIFER CLAPP PHOTO AS TO DEFENDANT ERIC, NICK AKA  NICHOLAS ERICK, NICHOLAS REYNOLDS DBA LUSE BRIDAL SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLAPP, JENNIFER DBA JENNIFER CLAPP PHOTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERIC, NICK AKA  NICHOLAS ERICK, NICHOLAS REYNOLDS DBA LUSE BRIDAL SF $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,365.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED HER CLAIM FOR REFUND OF HER DEPOSIT GIVEN TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 SERVED NOV-05-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ERIC, NICK AKA  NICHOLAS ERICK, NICHOLAS REYNOLDS DBA LUSE BRIDAL SF
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLAPP, JENNIFER DBA JENNIFER CLAPP PHOTO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER CLAPP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICK ERIC AKA NICHOLAS ERICK AND NICHOLAS REYNOLDS DBA LUSE BRIDAL SF IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CLAPP, JENNIFER DBA JENNIFER CLAPP PHOTO
